activities.name: User Authentication
activities.description: Implement multi-factor authentication (MFA) for all users accessing DoD resources.
activities.intent: Ensure only authenticated identities access resources by eliminating reliance on single-factor credentials.

activities.name: Privileged User Authentication
activities.description: Implement phishing-resistant MFA (e.g., FIDO2, PIV/CAC) for privileged accounts.
activities.intent: Reduce risk of credential theft for high-value accounts that have elevated access.

activities.name: Identity Stores
activities.description: Establish authoritative identity stores synchronized with personnel records.
activities.intent: Ensure identity lifecycle events (onboarding, offboarding, role changes) propagate consistently.

activities.name: Conditional Access
activities.description: Enforce conditional access policies based on user risk, device health, and behavioral signals.
activities.intent: Dynamically adjust access based on real-time risk context rather than static rules.

activities.name: Just-In-Time Privileged Access
activities.description: Implement just-in-time (JIT) provisioning for privileged access requests.
activities.intent: Minimize standing privileged access to reduce blast radius from compromised accounts.

activities.name: Device Inventory
activities.description: Maintain a comprehensive, continuously updated inventory of all devices.
activities.intent: Establish authoritative source of truth for all endpoints before applying policy.

activities.name: Device Health Validation
activities.description: Continuously validate device health, patch status, and configuration compliance before granting access.
activities.intent: Ensure compromised or misconfigured devices cannot pivot to protected resources.

activities.name: Endpoint Detection and Response
activities.description: Deploy EDR on all managed endpoints with centralized telemetry.
activities.intent: Detect and contain endpoint-based threats in near-real-time.

activities.name: Remote Access
activities.description: Implement Zero Trust Network Access (ZTNA) to replace legacy VPN for remote users.
activities.intent: Eliminate network-level implicit trust for remote connections.

activities.name: Mobile Device Management
activities.description: Enroll all mobile endpoints in MDM/UEM solution with enforced security baselines.
activities.intent: Extend device health and policy enforcement to mobile endpoints.

activities.name: Macro Segmentation
activities.description: Implement macro-level network segmentation separating enclaves, missions, and environments.
activities.intent: Limit lateral movement between broad organizational zones.

activities.name: Micro Segmentation
activities.description: Implement micro-segmentation to enforce workload-to-workload controls at the application layer.
activities.intent: Limit blast radius of a breach to the smallest possible network zone.

activities.name: Software Defined Networking
activities.description: Adopt SDN or overlay networking to enforce dynamic, policy-driven access.
activities.intent: Enable programmable enforcement of ZT policy across the network fabric.

activities.name: Encrypted Traffic
activities.description: Encrypt all traffic in transit, including east-west traffic within the enclave.
activities.intent: Remove implicit trust in network position by encrypting all data flows.

activities.name: DNS Security
activities.description: Implement DNS security controls including DNSSEC, DNS filtering, and logging.
activities.intent: Prevent DNS-based attacks and gain visibility into name resolution activity.

activities.name: Application Inventory
activities.description: Maintain authoritative inventory of all applications and their data flows.
activities.intent: Enable access policy to be tied to known, categorized applications.

activities.name: Application Access Policy
activities.description: Enforce application-layer access control tied to user identity, device health, and context.
activities.intent: Replace network-based access with identity and attribute-based application authorization.

activities.name: Secure Software Development
activities.description: Integrate security into the software development lifecycle (SSDLC).
activities.intent: Shift security left so vulnerabilities are caught before reaching production.

activities.name: Application Threat Protections
activities.description: Deploy WAF, RASP, and application-layer DDoS protection.
activities.intent: Protect exposed applications from exploitation of known and unknown vulnerabilities.

activities.name: Workload Authorization
activities.description: Implement workload identity and authorization for service-to-service communication.
activities.intent: Extend ZT principles to machine identities, not just human users.

activities.name: Data Inventory and Classification
activities.description: Discover, catalog, and classify all data assets by sensitivity.
activities.intent: Access policy cannot protect what is unknown; classification drives policy.

activities.name: Data Access Control
activities.description: Enforce least-privilege data access based on user role, data classification, and context.
activities.intent: Limit data exposure to only what is needed for the current authorized task.

activities.name: Data Encryption at Rest
activities.description: Encrypt all sensitive data at rest using approved cryptographic standards.
activities.intent: Ensure stored data is unreadable if physical or logical storage is compromised.

activities.name: Data Loss Prevention
activities.description: Deploy DLP controls to detect and prevent unauthorized data exfiltration.
activities.intent: Catch data leakage attempts at egress points before data leaves the environment.

activities.name: Rights Management
activities.description: Apply Information Rights Management (IRM) to sensitive documents.
activities.intent: Enforce data-level controls that travel with the document outside the perimeter.

activities.name: Log Aggregation
activities.description: Centralize logs from all pillars into a SIEM or data lake.
activities.intent: Enable correlation and threat hunting across the entire environment.

activities.name: UEBA
activities.description: Implement User and Entity Behavior Analytics to detect anomalies.
activities.intent: Surface subtle indicators of compromise that rule-based detection misses.

activities.name: Security Analytics and Orchestration
activities.description: Implement SOAR or automated playbooks for threat response.
activities.intent: Reduce dwell time by automating common triage and response actions.

activities.name: Continuous Monitoring
activities.description: Implement continuous monitoring of all ZT activities with automated alerting.
activities.intent: Detect deviations from policy in real time rather than through periodic audits.

activities.name: Policy Automation
activities.description: Automate ZT policy creation, distribution, and enforcement through a policy engine.
activities.intent: Remove human latency from policy decisions to achieve real-time enforcement.

activities.name: Identity Lifecycle Automation
activities.description: Automate joiner/mover/leaver processes tied to HR systems.
activities.intent: Eliminate manual provisioning errors and access accumulation over time.

activities.name: Incident Response Automation
activities.description: Automate initial incident triage, isolation, and notification.
activities.intent: Reduce mean time to contain by removing human bottlenecks from initial response.

activities.name: Configuration Management
activities.description: Enforce configuration compliance through automated drift detection and remediation.
activities.intent: Ensure the environment remains in its intended state without manual audit cycles.
